_description: Publicity/influence submenu options, externalized from actions.gd get_publicity_options() (L9, #621). Dictionary key order matches the pre-L9 literals.

actions.name: Networking
actions.description: Build relationships and connections in the AI safety community

actions.name: Media Campaign
actions.description: Public outreach through press and social media

actions.name: Lobby Government
actions.description: Advocate for AI safety regulation (costly but impactful)

actions.name: Public Warning
actions.description: Warn public about AI risks - risky but high impact

actions.name: Open Source Tools
actions.description: Release safety research publicly for community benefit
